name: Check of a "More..." button in Description section in LYRASIS
fullName: Book detail view screen: Check of a "More..." button in Description section in LYRASIS
statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Description section is empty
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BookDetailsSteps.isDescriptionNotEmpty(BookDetailsSteps.java:192)

java.lang.AssertionError: Description section is empty
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BookDetailsSteps.isDescriptionNotEmpty(BookDetailsSteps.java:192)
	at ✽.Description is not empty in book details screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/BookDetailView.feature:104)

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
And  Search 'available' book of distributor 'Axis 360' and bookType 'AUDIOBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  Book 'bookInfo' is opened on book details screen
And  Description is not empty in book details screen
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Description section is empty
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BookDetailsSteps.isDescriptionNotEmpty(BookDetailsSteps.java:192)
	at ✽.Description is not empty in book details screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/BookDetailView.feature:104)

steps.name: And  Button More in Description is available on book details screen
